exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your divorce coordination forward
items: Gather and organize all important financial documents including bank statements, tax returns, investment accounts, and property deeds
Research and interview at least 3 divorce attorneys in your area to understand your legal options and find the right representation
Create a detailed inventory of all shared assets, debts, and property with current values and ownership documentation
Schedule a consultation with a financial advisor to understand how divorce will impact your long-term financial goals and retirement planning
Establish a separate checking account and begin tracking your individual monthly living expenses
